author: y4rr
content: [result] COMPLETE — zero unimplemented f64 methods remaining. 66 f64 PTX kernels, 66 f64 backend_impl methods, all wired end-to-end. Added: cuBLAS dgemm (bmm_f64), cuSOLVER f64 (svd, cholesky, solve, qr), dropout_f64 + dropout_philox_f64, softmax/log_softmax f64 launchers, layernorm/rmsnorm f64 launchers. Every _f64 trait method in GpuBackend now has a real implementation. 3271 tests pass.
